name: Grip it N' Rip it Golf Simulators
address: 1405 N Broadway St, Mt Pleasant, IA 52641
about: Grip it N' Rip it Golf Simulators is a venue offering two high-end, 24/7 self-service golf simulator bays in Mt. Pleasant, Iowa. The facility allows players to book bays online, arrive at their scheduled time, and use an access code to begin playing immediately, with no staff required. Pricing is structured per bay, not per person, and is available for one to four-hour sessions, catering to golfers of all skill levels who want to play on their own schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 self-service access allows for flexible play anytime
High-end simulator technology provides a realistic golf experience
Accommodates groups of up to 8 people per bay for social play
Membership benefits include free hours and discounted late-night play

food_and_drink.notes: No information on on-site food service
No information on on-site alcohol service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify any policies on outside food or drinks, so it is recommended to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on the course and number of players, but with self-service access, you can take as much time as needed within your booking.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to all skill levels, including families, and allows children as part of groups up to 8 people per bay.
